user_input: We are seeking a senior IT director to oversee enterprise infrastructure, networking, and end-user support across multiple sites. The ideal candidate will have deep hands-on experience with Cisco routing and switching, wireless, firewalls, VoIP systems, Windows and Linux servers, virtualization, and storage platforms. This role will lead troubleshooting efforts, security and PCI-related initiatives, vendor coordination, and the administration of business applications and database systems. Experience supporting ERP environments, email systems, remote access tools, and a wide range of office hardware is highly desirable. The successful applicant will balance strategic leadership with the ability to step in on complex technical issues and guide a small team effectively. Please search our resume library, score candidates against this role, and give interview recommendations. (Synthetic eval; resume pool is English PDFs.)

We are looking for an IT coordinator or systems administrator who can support servers, desktops, databases, and business applications in a growing organization. The role requires strong experience with Microsoft Windows Server, Active Directory, SQL databases, and office productivity tools, along with the ability to troubleshoot user issues and maintain stable day-to-day operations. Familiarity with legacy and modern ERP systems, email platforms, and hardware/software installation is important. The right candidate will be organized, self-directed, and able to communicate clearly with both technical staff and business users. Experience providing reliable support in a small or mid-sized company environment is preferred. Please search our resume library, score candidates against this role, and give interview recommendations. (Synthetic eval; resume pool is English PDFs.)

Our organization is hiring a Vice President of IT Infrastructure and Operations to lead enterprise technology strategy, service delivery, and operational resilience. The successful candidate will manage infrastructure teams, oversee data center and network operations, and ensure reliable voice, cloud, and remote site connectivity. This role will own budgeting, vendor negotiations, disaster recovery planning, and risk mitigation across a complex environment. Strong experience improving network efficiency, managing telephony platforms, and coordinating infrastructure programs in healthcare or similarly regulated industries is highly valued. We need a decisive leader who can build teams, communicate with executives, and deliver measurable operational improvements. Please search our resume library, score candidates against this role, and give interview recommendations. (Synthetic eval; resume pool is English PDFs.)

We are seeking a Director of IT and Analytics to lead enterprise technology operations, information security risk management, and analytics-enabled business solutions. This position will oversee systems such as Windows Server, Active Directory, Exchange, Cisco networking, SAN storage, and telephony infrastructure while partnering with business leaders to launch new platforms. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in managing projects, guiding teams, and improving service quality across a complex organization. Experience with backup systems, collaboration tools, and security controls is important, as is the ability to translate business needs into practical technical solutions. This role is best suited for a seasoned manager who can bridge technology and operations while driving innovation. Please search our resume library, score candidates against this role, and give interview recommendations. (Synthetic eval; resume pool is English PDFs.)

We are seeking an entry-level database and IT support candidate with a strong academic background in computer systems and relational databases. The ideal applicant will have solid SQL skills, an understanding of database administration concepts, and familiarity with Windows, Unix, Linux, and Mac environments. This role includes supporting documentation, reporting, data preparation, and general administrative tasks for technical teams. Strong problem-solving ability, attention to detail, and customer service skills are essential. Candidates with exposure to web protocols, DNS, DHCP, FTP, and virtualization tools will be especially well matched. Please search our resume library, score candidates against this role, and give interview recommendations. (Synthetic eval; resume pool is English PDFs.)

Our university is looking for an IT manager/analyst to lead web development operations, coordinate technology projects, and supervise a small technical team. The ideal candidate will be skilled in requirements gathering, process improvement, strategic planning, and translating business needs into practical technology solutions. This role will manage multiple websites and collaborate with both technical and non-technical stakeholders across campus units. Strong project management experience and the ability to balance multiple priorities are essential. A candidate who enjoys mentoring staff and driving long-term improvements in information services will thrive in this position. Please search our resume library, score candidates against this role, and give interview recommendations. (Synthetic eval; resume pool is English PDFs.)

We are seeking an experienced practice manager to oversee daily operations in a healthcare environment and improve business processes across clinical and administrative functions. The successful candidate will have a strong background in regulatory compliance, budget planning, contract negotiation, and operational leadership. This role requires experience working with electronic medical record systems, enterprise networking basics, and infrastructure improvements that support patient care and staff productivity. The ideal applicant will be comfortable managing change, coordinating with executives, and ensuring HIPAA-aligned operations. An MBA or equivalent business leadership experience is highly desirable. Please search our resume library, score candidates against this role, and give interview recommendations. (Synthetic eval; resume pool is English PDFs.)

A large public-sector organization is hiring a Deputy Director of Information Technology to lead infrastructure, operations, and data center services. This senior leader will supervise multiple divisions, oversee 24x7 service delivery, and coordinate enterprise systems running on mainframe, server, cloud, and mixed operating environments. The role includes responsibility for storage, databases, network communications, security tools, and service management across a broad technical portfolio. The ideal candidate will bring extensive management experience, bilingual communication skills, and a proven record of leading large teams in complex IT operations. Experience in government, education, or similarly structured environments is strongly preferred. Please search our resume library, score candidates against this role, and give interview recommendations. (Synthetic eval; resume pool is English PDFs.)
